AbsencePattern.description: Recurring absence pattern (e.g. homeoffice every Monday)

lot_id.description: Parking lot ID the slot belongs to

AdminGrantCreditsRequest.description: Request body for admin credit grant

AdminResetPasswordRequest.description: Request body for resetting a user's password

AdminResetRequest.description: Request body for database reset confirmation

AdminUpdateUserRequest.description: Request body for admin user update

AdminUserResponse.description: Response type for admin user listing (includes status field)

AllocationTransparencyMode.description:
Current algorithmic transparency mode for allocation and recommendation
endpoints. Controls whether the scored/exact-cover path is active
(`algorithmic`) or disabled (`fifo_only`).

Customers who want to remain outside EU AI Act "AI-system" scope can set
`fifo_only`: algorithmic endpoints refuse with `409 ALGORITHMIC_DISABLED`
and direct callers to the rule-based waitlist path. The FIFO ordering
itself lives in the waitlist module; this switch does not add a new
allocator.

ApproveAbsenceRequest.description: Request body for approving an absence

AutoReleaseSettingsRequest.description: Request body for auto-release settings update

AutomatedDecisionNotice.description:
EU AI Act Art. 50 automated-decision transparency notice.

Included in every response that carries a scored or constraint-based
allocation decision. The `basis` list is truthful per endpoint: it names
only the data inputs the algorithm actually consumed, not aspirational
inputs.

`review_contact` names the role (not an email address) the subject should
contact to request human review under Art. 22 GDPR. `art22_review_available`
is `true` because all algorithmic decisions in this system can be reviewed
by an administrator.

art22_review_available.description: Whether a human review of this decision is available (Art. 22 GDPR).

basis.description: Data inputs used by the decision algorithm for this specific endpoint.

is_automated.description: Always `true` for responses served by the algorithmic path.

mode.description: Active transparency mode at the time of the decision.

review_contact.description: Role to contact for human-review requests (Art. 22 GDPR).

max_advance_booking_days.description: Maximum days in advance a booking can be made (0 = unlimited)

max_booking_duration_hours.description: Maximum booking duration in hours (0 = no maximum)

min_booking_duration_hours.description: Minimum booking duration in hours (0 = no minimum)

BulkDeleteRequest.description: Request body for bulk user deletion.

BulkUserUpdateRequest.description: Request body for bulk user update.

role.description: Role to set (only used with `"set_role"` action)

ClaimOfferRequest.description: Request body for claiming a waitlist offer

end_time.description: Booking end time (defaults to `start_time + 2h` if omitted).

start_time.description: Booking start time (defaults to now if omitted).

ClassRunResult.description:
Result from a single class purge run (reported in the evidence log and
returned from the run API).

allOf.description:
JSON Schema document (draft 2020-12) describing the module's
settings. Transparent — fields are flattened into the parent
response.

ConfigSchema.description:
Wrapper that transparently serialises a JSON Schema document (draft
2020-12) into the API payload while still giving utoipa a handle on
the field for schema generation.

The inner `schema` is a `serde_json::Value` because JSON Schema
documents are themselves unbounded in shape — encoding it as an
arbitrary `Object` lets us round-trip any valid schema without
forcing a second-order type. `#[serde(flatten)]` pulls the schema's
top-level keys (`type`, `properties`, `required`, …) onto the
response envelope so clients see the raw schema, not a
`{schema: {...}}` wrapper.

CreateApiKeyRequest.description: Request to create an API key.

expires_in_days.description: Optional expiry in days (None = never expires)

CreateCheckoutRequest.description: Request to create a Stripe checkout session for credit purchase.

price_per_credit.description: Price per credit in cents (smallest currency unit)

CreateGuestBookingRequest.description: Request body for creating a guest booking

CreateMaintenanceRequest.description: Request to create a maintenance window

total_slots.description: Total number of parking slots to auto-generate (defaults to 10)

CreateRecurringBookingRequest.description: Request body for creating a recurring booking

CreateSwapRequestBody.description: Request body for creating a swap request

active.description: Whether the webhook is active (defaults to true)

url.description: Target URL for webhook delivery (must be HTTPS)

EmailSettingsRequest.description: Request body for email settings update

automated_decision.description: EU AI Act Art. 50 automated-decision transparency notice.

additional_minutes.description: Additional minutes to extend (15 min - 8 hours)

ForgotPasswordRequest.description: Request body for the forgot-password endpoint

IcalImportResult.description: Result of an iCal absence import.

skipped.description: Number of events skipped (missing required fields).

ImportError.description: Describes a single row that failed during import.

field.description: The field that caused the failure (empty string if row-level).

row.description: 1-based row number in the CSV (excluding the header).

ImportRequest.description: Import request body (CSV or JSON, base64-encoded CSV data or raw JSON array).

data.description: Base64-encoded CSV or JSON array as string

ImportResult.description: Result of a bulk CSV user import operation.

errors.description: Rows that failed validation or could not be imported.

JoinWaitlistRequest.description: Request body for joining the waitlist

ListModulesResponse.description:
Backwards-compatible envelope for `GET /api/v1/modules`.

- `modules`: the legacy flat Boolean map. Kept exactly as it was so
  old clients and integration tests keep passing.
- `module_info`: the enriched `Vec<ModuleInfo>` added in T-1720.
- `version`: the workspace crate version.

module_info.description: Enriched per-module metadata. Order matches the registry.

modules.description: Legacy flat feature map — `{ "bookings": true, "vehicles": true, … }`.

logo.description: Base64-encoded image data, optionally with a `data:<mime>;base64,` prefix.

check_in_deadline_minutes.description:
Minutes after booking start that a missing check-in triggers release.
`0` disables auto-release for this lot.

claim_window_minutes.description:
Minutes the promoted waitlist user has to claim their offer before it
passes to the next entry.

ModuleCategory.description:
Semantic grouping used by the admin Modules Dashboard.

Serialized as kebab-case (stable JSON, matches the kebab-case
module slugs and aligns with the Web UI category filter values).

ModuleConfig.description:
Response + request body for the config editor. Carries both the
schema (so the UI can render a form) and the current persisted values
(so the UI can pre-fill fields). The PATCH request shape reuses the
same struct: send `{"values": {...}}` and leave `schema` empty /
ignored.

Using one struct for both directions keeps the client contract
symmetric and means a `PATCH` response can be fed straight back into
the editor without renormalisation.

schema.description:
Parsed schema for this module, echoed back so clients don't need
to re-fetch it after a PATCH. On PATCH requests this field is
ignored — the server is the source of truth for schemas.

ModuleInfo.description:
Runtime-serializable view of a [`ModuleDef`] with owned strings.

Shape used by `GET /api/v1/modules`, `GET /api/v1/modules/{name}`
and the `PATCH /api/v1/admin/modules/{name}` response body.

- `runtime_toggleable` — `true` for modules that honour an admin
  setting that flips them on/off without a rebuild. Fifteen safe-to-
  toggle rows are marked true; security-sensitive modules keep it
  `false`.
- `runtime_enabled` — effective enablement after applying any
  runtime override. For rows with `runtime_toggleable = false` this
  always equals `enabled`. For toggleable rows, the handler reads
  `module.{name}.runtime_enabled` from the settings store and
  overrides this field accordingly (see [`module_registry`]).

oneOf.description:
Parsed JSON Schema for the module's admin config editor.

`Some(_)` when the module declared a literal `config_schema` in
its [`ModuleDef`] row; `None` otherwise. Present in
`/api/v1/modules` so the admin dashboard can decide whether to
render an "Edit config" affordance without a second round trip.

depends_on.description: Other module slugs that must be enabled for this to work.

name.description: Stable slug — matches the feature flag without the `mod-` prefix.

runtime_enabled.description:
Effective enablement after applying the runtime override. Equal
to `enabled` when the module is not runtime-toggleable.

runtime_toggleable.description:
When true, the module's observable behavior can be toggled at
runtime via an admin setting (without a rebuild). The UI surfaces
a toggle only for these.

version.description: Semver — tied to the workspace version.

phone_number.description: Phone number for SMS/WhatsApp (E.164 format, e.g. "+491234567890")

PatchBookingRequest.description: Request body for patching a booking

PrivacySettingsRequest.description: Request body for privacy settings update

RecommendationBadge.description: Recommendation reason badge for the frontend

RecommendationsResponse.description:
Combined response for `GET /api/v1/bookings/recommendations`.

Wraps the recommendation list with an EU AI Act Art. 50 transparency
notice so callers always know they are receiving automated decisions and
have a path to request human review.

automated_decision.description: EU AI Act Art. 50 automated-decision transparency notice.

RegisterVisitorRequest.description: Request body for pre-registering a visitor

RejectAbsenceRequest.description: Request body for rejecting an absence

RescheduleRequest.description: Request body for rescheduling a booking

ResetPasswordRequest.description: Request body for the reset-password endpoint

RetentionClass.description:
All recognised retention / deletion classes.

The serialised form (snake_case string) matches the value stored in the
`details.retention_deletion_class` field of audit log entries.

RunReport.description: Result from a full [`RetentionEngine::run`] across all classes.

dry_run.description: When true the engine counts matching rows but does not delete them.

SaveWidgetLayoutRequest.description: Request to save a widget layout

SetAccessibleRequest.description: Request to toggle accessible status on a slot

SetLocationRequest.description: Request body for setting a lot's geographic coordinates.

create_sample_data.description: Whether to create sample parking lot data

has_admin.description: Whether at least one admin user exists

has_parking_lots.description: Whether at least one parking lot exists

setup_completed.description: Whether initial setup has been completed

StartChargingRequest.description: Request to start a charging session

SubmitAbsenceRequest.description: Request body for submitting an absence request

SubscribeWaitlistRequest.description: Request body for subscribing to waitlist

TranslationOverride.description: An approved translation override (applied at runtime)

TwoFactorLoginRequest.description: Login response extension when 2FA is required.

TwoFactorVerifyRequest.description: Request body for verifying a TOTP code.

code.description: The 6-digit TOTP code from the authenticator app

UpdateAbsenceRequest.description: Request body for updating an absence

UpdateAccessibilityNeedsRequest.description: Request to update user accessibility needs

UpdateCurrentUserRequest.description: Request body for updating the current user's profile

UpdateDynamicPricingRequest.description: Request body for updating dynamic pricing rules.

discount_multiplier.description: Multiplier applied when occupancy is below `discount_threshold`

discount_threshold.description: Occupancy percentage (0-100) below which discount pricing activates

surge_threshold.description: Occupancy percentage (0-100) that triggers surge pricing

UpdateLotNoshowConfigRequest.description: Request body for updating per-lot no-show config

check_in_deadline_minutes.description: Minutes after booking start before auto-release. `0` = disabled for this lot.

claim_window_minutes.description: Minutes the promoted user has to claim. Must be ≥ 1.

UpdateLotPricingRequest.description: Request body for updating lot pricing.

daily_max.description:
Daily price cap — the maximum charged for any single day of parking.
When set, `hourly_rate × hours` is capped at this value.

hourly_rate.description: Hourly rate in the lot's currency (e.g. 2.50 for €2.50/h)

monthly_pass.description: Monthly pass price (flat rate for the whole month)

UpdateMaintenanceRequest.description: Request to update a maintenance window

UpdateModuleConfigRequest.description:
PATCH request body — only `values`, no schema.

Kept as a separate struct (instead of reusing [`ModuleConfig`]) so
the OpenAPI request-body schema doesn't accept a (server-owned)
`schema` field.

values.description:
New values keyed by schema property name. Each value must pass
the schema validator for its property.

UpdateModuleRequest.description:
Request body for the runtime-toggle endpoint.

A deliberately minimal shape — only `runtime_enabled` is settable
from the admin UI. `enabled` stays compile-time-only (matches the
underlying cargo feature flag and therefore a rebuild).

runtime_enabled.description:
New effective runtime enablement. Persisted to admin setting
`module.{name}.runtime_enabled`.

total_slots.description: Total number of slots (changing this will NOT auto-generate/remove slots)

ttl_days.description: Desired TTL in days. Must not be below the statutory minimum for legal-hold classes.

UpdatePreferencesRequest.description: Request body for updating user preferences

monthly_quota.description: Monthly credit quota (0 = unlimited/no quota, max 999)

UpdateRecurringBookingRequest.description: Request body for updating a recurring booking

UpdateSwapRequestBody.description: Request body for accepting/declining a swap request

UpdateUserRoleRequest.description: Request body for updating a user's role

UpdateUserStatusRequest.description: Request body for updating a user's status

regenerate_secret.description: If true, regenerate the HMAC signing secret

color.description: New display color (optional, hex code e.g. "#FFD700")

VehiclePhotoUpload.description: Request body for uploading a vehicle photo as base64-encoded image data.

photo.description:
Base64-encoded image, optionally prefixed with a data URI scheme
(e.g. `data:image/jpeg;base64,...`).

fuel_type.description:
Powertrain / fuel type — feeds CO2 accounting. One of
`unknown`, `gasoline`, `diesel`, `hybrid`, `plugin_hybrid`,
`electric`, `hydrogen`. Omit for legacy clients; server defaults
to `unknown`.

id.description:
Stripe event id (e.g. `evt_1NqX...`). Used for idempotency dedup —
duplicate deliveries short-circuit before the credit mutation.

WebhookObject.description: Webhook object (checkout session or payment intent).

WidgetEntry.description: A widget entry in the user's layout

WidgetPosition.description: Position and size of a widget on the dashboard grid

info.description: Open-source parking lot management system API. Provides endpoints for user authentication, booking management, parking lot administration, credit system, webhooks, and more.
info.title: ParkHub API

get.description: Returns absences for the authenticated user.

post.description: Records a new absence for the authenticated user.
Parse VEVENT blocks from an iCal (RFC 5545) body and create absences for the authenticated user. DTSTART and DTEND are required; SUMMARY is used to infer the absence type.

put.description: Saves DDG paragraph 5 Impressum fields. Admin only.
Set the operating hours schedule for a parking lot.
Admin endpoint to set latitude/longitude for a parking lot.

Mark or unmark a parking slot as accessible. Admin only.

patch.description: Admin-only. Flips a runtime-toggleable module on/off via admin setting `module.{name}.runtime_enabled`. Returns 400 for unknown slug and 409 when the module is marked runtime_toggleable=false (security-sensitive — cannot be disabled without a rebuild). Audit-logged.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns the JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) describing the module's admin config payload plus the currently persisted values. Returns 404 when the slug is unknown and 400 when the module has no schema declared.
get.summary: Read a module's config schema + current values

patch.description: Admin-only. Validates the `values` body against the module's JSON Schema. On success writes each field to `module.{name}.config.{field}` in the settings store and emits a `ConfigChanged` audit entry. Returns 422 with a per-violation error list when validation fails.

get.description: Return privacy and GDPR settings. Admin only.

put.description: Update privacy and GDPR settings. Admin only.

get.description: Returns current rate limit statistics per endpoint group.
Returns blocked requests over the last 24 hours in hourly bins.
Returns daily booking stats.
Occupancy trends with date range.
Revenue breakdown by lot and time period.
User growth, active users by period.

post.description: Wipes all data. Destructive. Admin only.

get.description: Returns deletion-evidence records written after each purge run.

post.description: Triggers an immediate retention purge across all surfaces. Set dry_run=true to count without deleting.

post.description: Create a checkout session for purchasing credits. Returns a checkout URL.

get.description: Returns the payment/checkout history for the authenticated user.

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events. Verifies signature, then processes checkout completions to grant credits.

400.description: Invalid event or signature verification failed

get.description: Returns minimal HTML for digital signage.
Returns real-time occupancy. No auth required.

post.description: Register a Web Push subscription endpoint for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Remove all push notification subscriptions for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the server's VAPID public key for Web Push subscription. No auth required.

post.description: Admin-only: solve a batch allocation using exact-cover Algorithm X. Includes an EU AI Act Art. 50 transparency notice. Returns 409 when algorithmic allocation is disabled.

get.description: Admin-only: view recommendation service statistics.
List the current user's recurring booking patterns.

post.description: Create a new recurring booking pattern (e.g. every Tuesday 8-17).

delete.description: Delete a recurring booking pattern. Verifies ownership.

put.description: Update days_of_week, start_date, or end_date of a recurring booking. Only the owner or an admin may update.

Create the first admin user and configure the system. Only works before setup is completed.

List the current user's swap requests (as requester or target).

put.description: Accept or decline a swap request.

Returns the authenticated user's credit balance, monthly quota, and recent transactions.

200.description: User credit balance and recent transactions

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's display name, phone, and/or profile picture.

delete.description: Anonymizes user PII while preserving booking records.

get.description: Exports all personal data as JSON download.
Retrieves any user's profile. Admin/SuperAdmin only.
Returns all vehicles registered by the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds a vehicle to the authenticated user's account.

get.description: Returns a map of German Kfz-Kennzeichen area codes to city names.

delete.description: Removes a vehicle. Only the owner can delete.

put.description: Updates vehicle details. Only the owner can update.

get.description: Returns the stored vehicle photo as binary.

post.description: Uploads a base64-encoded vehicle photo (JPEG or PNG, max 2 MB).

get.description: List all visitors registered by the current user.

post.description: Pre-register a visitor with name, email, vehicle plate, and visit date.

delete.description: Cancel a visitor registration. Only the host or admin can cancel.

put.description: Mark a visitor as checked in.

get.description: Returns waitlist entries for the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds the user to a lot waitlist.

get.description: Returns waitlist entries with status `offered` belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Converts an active waitlist offer into a confirmed booking. Finds the first available slot in the offered lot. Promotion order is strict FIFO by `created_at` (AI-Act compliant). Idempotent: if the entry is already Accepted the request is rejected with 409 so the caller must use the booking referenced in `accepted_booking_id`.

409.description: No available slot or entry not in offered state

delete.description: Removes the user from a waitlist entry.

get.description: Returns all configured webhooks. Admin only.

post.description: Register a new webhook endpoint. URL must be HTTPS and pass SSRF validation. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently remove a webhook. Admin only.

put.description: Update an existing webhook's URL, events, or active status. Admin only.

post.description: Deliver a test payload to verify webhook connectivity. Admin only.

get.description: Returns the calculated price for a zone based on its tier and pricing multiplier.

post.description: Verifies protocol version compatibility between client and server.

get.description: Returns 200 OK when the server is running.
